description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a light blue exterior, a dark gray gabled roof, and a wooden privacy fence enclosing the backyard. The front facade features a central door flanked by two lantern-style lights, a large window to the left, and a single-car garage to the right. A concrete walkway leads from the driveway to the front door, bordered by two rectangular flower beds filled with purple flowers. The backyard includes a patio area, visible garden beds, and a hot tub in the rear right corner. The windows are arranged in a mix of single and grouped panes, with a trellis supporting climbing plants on the rear wall. The overall design is simple and functional, typical of mid-20th-century suburban homes.
description: A light blue, single-story bungalow with a dark gray gabled roof, front garden beds, and a fenced backyard featuring a patio and hot tub.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, walkway, and two flower beds.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and the length of the house with a single window.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced backyard, patio, garden beds, large windows, and a hot tub.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the backyard fence, side window, and the rear garden area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and single windows on all sides
